name: Utah Workers' Comp Filing Deadlines After Workplace Injury

mainEntity.name: What is the workers' compensation filing deadline after a workplace injury in Utah?
mainEntity.text: What is the workers' compensation filing deadline after a workplace injury in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, you must report a workplace injury to your employer within 180 days and file a formal claim with the Labor Commission within 3 years from the injury date or 1 year from the last payment of benefits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Code §34A-2-407 requires initial notice to employer within 180 days of injury. Formal application for hearing must be filed within 3 years of injury or 1 year after benefits stop. Delays can bar claims; insurance adjusters may use missed deadlines against you. Consult a local attorney immediately to preserve rights in Salt Lake or Davis County areas.
